description_long: This is a small, clear glass bottle with a wide cylindrical body and a short neck, topped by a glossy black screw cap. The bottle contains a dark liquid, likely ink, filling most of its volume. The front features a white label with black printed text and illustrations, including the brand 'Winsor & Newton' and the product name 'INK', along with a drawing of a spider and web. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with additional smaller text and symbols visible on the sides. The glass is smooth and highly reflective, giving the bottle a sleek, polished appearance. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the cap appears tightly sealed.
description: A clear glass bottle filled with black ink, featuring a glossy black screw cap and a detailed white label with branding and illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'Winsor & Newton INK' branding and spider illustration.
description_view_1: Side view with a partial label visible, showing additional text and symbols.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label, displaying the clear glass and dark liquid inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a different section of the label visible, including more text.
attribute_label_or_branding: White label with black text and illustrations, including 'Winsor & Newton INK', a spider drawing, and additional small text and symbols. Label is placed on the front and partially wraps around the bottle.
